user.title: Cloudflare Workers AI
user.description: Enter your Cloudflare API credentials. You need an API token with Workers AI Read permission.

data_description.account_id: Your Cloudflare Account ID, found in the dashboard sidebar.
data_description.api_token: An API token with Workers AI Read permission.
data_description.use_ai_gateway: Route requests through Cloudflare AI Gateway for analytics, caching, and rate limiting.
data_description.gateway_id: The name or ID of your AI Gateway.
data_description.gateway_api_token: A separate API token for AI Gateway authentication. Leave empty to use the same API token.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Please enter a valid API token.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Cloudflare Workers AI
reconfigure.description: Update your Cloudflare API credentials and gateway settings.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token or insufficient permissions.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Cloudflare API.
error.already_configured: This Cloudflare account is already configured.

abort.already_configured: This Cloudflare account is already configured.

init.title: Conversation Agent
init.description: Configure the Cloudflare Workers AI conversation agent.

data_description.chat_model: The Workers AI model to use for conversation. Models with function calling support can control Home Assistant.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select which Home Assistant APIs the model can use to control your home.
data_description.prompt: Instructions for the AI on how to behave and respond.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens in the response.
data_description.temperature: Controls randomness. Lower values are more focused, higher values more creative.
data_description.enable_thinking: When enabled, the model reasons step-by-step before answering. Improves accuracy but increases response time. Supported by Kimi K2.5, QwQ, and other reasoning models.

data_description.tts_model: The Workers AI model to use for text-to-speech.
data_description.voice: The voice to use for speech synthesis.

data_description.stt_model: The Workers AI model to use for speech-to-text transcription.

auth_failed.message: Authentication with Cloudflare failed. Please check your API token.

api_error.message: Error communicating with Cloudflare Workers AI: {error}

max_tool_iterations.message: The AI model was unable to complete the request after multiple attempts.
